content: We can repurpose HippoRAG2's graph-based non-parametric memory structure to store prediction errors generated by the 2025 generation of ICM curiosity autonomous agents, turning unstructured intrinsic reward signals into connective long-term memory that prioritizes high-curiosity unexplored state-action connections. This allows the agent to avoid repeatedly revisiting the same low-value novel regions by leveraging HippoRAG2's Personalized PageRank to recall and navigate existing knowledge of unknown space.
